nasb.text: How blessed are your men, how blessed are these your servants who stand before you continually and hear your wisdom.

esv.text: Happy are your wives! Happy are these your servants, who continually stand before you and hear your wisdom!

cnv.text: 屬你的人是有福的，你的臣僕是有福的，因為他們可以常常侍立在你面前，聆聽你的智慧。

ccb.text: 你的臣仆经常侍立在你面前聆听智慧之言，真有福气！
